entries.result: Talks to themselves under their breath
Never makes direct eye contact
Laughs at their own jokes even when no one else does
Refers to themselves in the third person
Always eating or drinking something
Collects something mundane obsessively (corks, pebbles, buttons)
Quotes proverbs or old sayings at every opportunity
Taps a rhythm on any nearby surface while thinking
Deeply superstitious about a specific number or colour
Startles easily but immediately pretends it didn't happen
Unusually formal in all speech and mannerisms
Never uses names — describes people by a memorable feature instead
Frequently glances over their shoulder
Volunteers unsolicited opinions on everything
Excessively apologetic, even for things outside their control
Speaks very slowly and deliberately, choosing every word
Constantly predicts that things will go badly
Claims to be distantly related to someone famous
Repeats the last thing said to them before responding
Smells faintly of something oddly specific (cinnamon, wet stone, candle wax)
